title: lycopodium novoguineense
intro: Lycopodium novoguineense, also known as New Guinea club moss, is a species of club moss in the genus Lycopodium. It is a type of evergreen plant that grows in the tropical regions of New Guinea and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin problems. Lycopodium novoguineense can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and boost the immune system.
